rows.label: qev065402_MSG0001
rows.name:
Thank you... To be honest, I
thought I was done for...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065402_MSG0002
rows.name:
We didn't take this
lightly either, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065402_MSG0003
rows.name:
However, the enemy had perfectly
prepared their interceptions, as
if they knew we were coming.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065402_MSG0004
rows.name:
They shouldn't have known that
Clemons obtained the information...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065402_MSG0005
rows.name:
I don't want to think about it, but
perhaps the information leak itself
was part of the enemy's plan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065402_MSG0006
rows.name:
For Clemons of all people to fall for
such suspicious information... It should
have been impossible, and yet...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065402_MSG0007
rows.name:
Well, there's no use
thinking about that here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065402_MSG0008
rows.name:
Unfortunately, there are no other
survivors besides me. The operation
is a complete failure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065402_MSG0009
rows.name:
First, we must retreat. Even
if we start over, we have to
formulate a plan back in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065402_MSG0010
rows.name:
...I'm fine. If it's just going back, I
can manage it alone. You go on ahead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065402_MSG0011
rows.name:
My whole body is battered,
but... I can make it. I'll
return to NLA no matter what.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065402_MSG0012
rows.name:
I have to report this incident
properly so that there won't be
any more victims like us...[ST:wait ]
